settings.advisor.syncBacklog.description: Pause the main agent for up to 30 秒 if the advisor falls behind by this many turns. 关 disables catch-up delays.
settings.advisor.syncBacklog.label: 顾问同步积压
settings.defaultThinkingLevel.descriptio: 具有思考能力的模型的推理深度
settings.defaultThinkingLevel.label: 思考等级
settings.doubleEscapeAction.label: 双击 Esc 操作
settings.fastModeScope.description: 快速模式优先的作用域

settings.includeWorkspaceTree.label: 包含工作区树
settings.inlineToolDescriptors.descripti: Render full tool descriptors in the system prompt and strip top-level/nested descriptions from provider tool schemas so descriptor text is sent once. 自动 enables this for Gemini models and disables it otherwise
settings.inlineToolDescriptors.label: 内联工具描述
settings.inlineToolDescriptors.options.a: Gemini 模型内联描述符，其他模型保留在工具 schema 中
settings.inlineToolDescriptors.options.o: 仅保留在提供方工具 schema 中
始终 inline descriptors in the system prompt

settings.minP.options.-1.label: 默认

settings.retry.maxDelayMs.description: 最大 wait between retries, in ms. When the provider asks us to wait longer than this and no credential or model fallback succeeds, the request fails fast instead of sleeping (e.g. 3-hour Anthropic rate-limit windows).
settings.retry.maxDelayMs.label: 最大重试延迟

settings.retry.modelFallback.label: 重试模型回退
settings.serviceTier.label: 服务等级
settings.serviceTierAdvisor.description: Service Tier for the advisor model. 无 = standard processing; Inherit = match the main agent's live tier; pick a value (e.g. Priority) to run the advisor on a faster serving path.
settings.serviceTierAdvisor.label: 服务等级 - 顾问
